jsonLd.title: Mid-Level SEO Specialist at CaratLane
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, CaratLane in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About CaratLane:
CaratLane is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CaratLane!
